query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS state_tax_rates (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  country_code VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USA',
  state_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  state_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  tax_type ENUM('flat', 'progressive', 'none') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'flat',
  flat_rate DECIMAL(6, 4) DEFAULT NULL,
  has_local_tax BOOLEAN DEFAULT FALSE,
  effective_date DATE NOT NULL,
  expiration_date DATE DEFAULT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_state_effective (country_code, state_code, effective_date)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS state_tax_brackets (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  state_tax_rate_id INT NOT NULL,
  min_income DECIMAL(18, 2) NOT NULL,
  max_income DECIMAL(18, 2) DEFAULT NULL,
  rate DECIMAL(6, 4) NOT NULL,
  filing_status ENUM('single', 'married_filing_jointly', 'married_filing_separately', 'head_of_household') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'single',
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  FOREIGN KEY (state_tax_rate_id) REFERENCES state_tax_rates(id)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS local_tax_rates (
  id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT,
  country_code VARCHAR(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'USA',
  state_code VARCHAR(10) NOT NULL,
  locality_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL,
  locality_type ENUM('city', 'county', 'district', 'school_district') NOT NULL DEFAULT 'city',
  tax_rate DECIMAL(6, 4) NOT NULL,
  is_resident_only BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE,
  effective_date DATE NOT NULL,
  expiration_date DATE DEFAULT NULL,
  notes TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  updated_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  UNIQUE KEY unique_locality_effective (country_code, state_code, locality_name, effective_date)
);

CREATE INDEX idx_state_tax_country ON state_tax_rates(country_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_state_tax_state ON state_tax_rates(state_code);
CREATE INDEX idx_local_tax_state ON local_tax_rates(state_code);
